name: Volcanic Gold Mines Inc.
summary: Volcanic Gold Mines Inc. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties. The company explores for gold and silver resources. It holds an option to earn a 60% interest in Holly-Banderas gold/silver properties covering 240,000 hectares of applications for mineral concessions located in Guatemala. The company was formerly known as Volcanic Metals Corp. and changed its name to Volcanic Gold Mines Inc. in January 2017. Volcanic Gold Mines Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
